explicitNutMentions: Lincoln Park lunch and dinner menu: kale & cashew salad - roasted cashew vin, crispy noodles

sections.name: Limited edition
items: Fatty Ramen - fortified tonkatsu broth, crispy carnitas, burnt garlic oil, cabbage

sections.name: Lunch and dinner specialties
items: Miso soup
Karaage chicken nuggets - lime kosho aioli
Tuna & avocado tartare - sesame crisps, rice crisps, poblano, cilantro
Edamame hummus - sesame crisps, rice crisps
Salad-San - carrot-ginger dressing
Chili crunch cucumbers - szechuan chili crunch, soy vinegar
Bang Bang Shrimp - tobanjan, sesame
Fried brussels sprouts - crispy shallots, tofu sauce
Roasted edamame - garlic oil, s&p mix
Japanese eggplant fries - mint, cilantro, yuzu mayo
Kale & cashew salad - roasted cashew vin, crispy noodles

sections.name: Mantou buns, wings, and dumplings
items: Fried chicken bun - shredded cabbage, japanese mustard
Pork belly bun - spicy mayo, kimchi cucumber
Crispy tofu bun - sweet and spicy thai sauce, mixed greens
Sticky Thai wings
Spicy Szechuan wings
XOXO shrimp & pork dumplings
Chicken & vegetable gyoza
Crab rangoon

10 Hour Tonkotsu - traditional broth, chashu, molten egg
Kimchi & fried chicken - fried garlic, buttered corn
Chicken Shio - buttered corn, molten egg, nori

sections.name: Express lunch and lucky hour
items: Express lunch mains include 10 Hour Tonkotsu, Chicken Shio, and Tantan-San
Express lunch rice plates include miso salmon, karaage chicken, skirt steak, and vegetable fried rice
Express lunch additions include sesame chili, kimchi, tofu, fried chicken, karaage chicken, chashu pork, and xo wontons
Lucky Hour food includes Fried Chicken Bun, Karaage Chicken Nuggets, and Chili Crunch Cucumbers

sections.name: Deluxe maki, sides, and dessert
items: Salmon avocado maki - faroe island salmon, toasted sesame
Avocado tempura maki - crispy tempura, yuzu mayo, sweet soy
Spicy tuna maki - avocado, cilantro, jalapeno
Crunchy tuna maki - avocado, cilantro, yuzu mayo, sweet soy
Shrimp tempura maki - spicy korean mayo, black sesame seeds
Spicy salmon maki - faroe island salmon, spicy yuzu, cilantro
Maki express set served with edamame, small salad-san, and miso soup
Veg sides include fried brussels and spicy kimchi
Desserts include hot donuts and thai tea creme brulee

notes: The pasted Lincoln Park lunch and dinner menu explicitly includes cashew in the kale & cashew salad.
The menu repeatedly mentions sesame, including sesame crisps, sesame on bang bang shrimp, sesame chili oil, toasted sesame, and black sesame seeds.
The menu says gluten-free items can be made gluten free with slight modifications and asks diners to advise the restaurant of any dietary restrictions and allergies.
This source is repo-backed so future rescans do not need to re-fetch the live menu page.
